gist.headline: Hitting the books
gist.blurb: Dannszz just planted StudyCcc in the greenhouse. It's a new suite of study tools built on our infrastructure, because sometimes you need AI to help you focus.
gist.summary: Added StudyCcc, a new suite of study tools created by community member Dannszz, to the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use StudyCcc from our community greenhouse to enhance their learning and study sessions.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy pixel art study room. The Pollinations bee (Polly) wearing tiny reading glasses, reading a book or looking at a glowing retro computer screen displaying study notes. The Nomnom creature is eating a stack of flashcards. Books, plants, and a warm desk lamp.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering over a wooden desk covered in open books and study notes. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a stack of flashcards with a 'NOMNOM' speech bubble. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm desk lamp lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
